title: Add e2e coverage, operator docs and handoff
requirements: Add Django Client e2e for issue queue -> issue detail -> action -> MemoryReviewAction.
Add Django Client e2e for index health -> reindex/delete stale action -> MemoryReviewAction.
Add negative e2e for unauthorized user and privacy-limited user.
Add safety assertion that responses and action logs do not contain raw secret, raw PII, full extracted text or raw query.
Update operator documentation with roles, actions and limitations.
Update planning/workflow status and project structure after implementation.
acceptance_checks: python manage.py test apps.memory.tests apps.settings_center.tests apps.ai.tests
